message:
feat(rich_rust): add sync module RFC and enhance traceback rendering

Improvements to the Rich terminal formatting library:

Sync module RFC (sync.rs):
- Design document for mutex poison handling strategy
- Analysis of current lock usage patterns across modules
- Proposal for consistent error handling approach
- Trade-offs between silent skip, recover, and panic strategies

Traceback enhancements (traceback.rs):
- Improved stack frame formatting
- Better syntax highlighting integration
- Source context line display improvements

Property tests (property_tests.rs):
- Additional property-based tests for rendering invariants

Library exports (lib.rs):
- Updated module exports

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
